reviews.originalComment: Menginap di Portola Grand Renggali Hotel Takengon benar-benar pengalaman yg memuaskan. Kami memesan kamar dgn view yg mengarah langsung ke Danau Lut Tawar. Di pagi hari, jendela kamar hotel yg cukup besar bs sekaligus dimanfaatkan untuk berjemur mengingat kamar tsb juga menawarkan pemandangan sunrise. Restoran hotel ini juga menyediakan menu yg bervariasi, sarapan jg lengkap dan buffet. Pelayanannya ramah, makanannya enak, dan suasana restonya jg langsung mengarah ke danau, cocok buat deep talk bersama pasangan, dan untuk sekadar melepas penat sambil menikmati udara segar Takengon - Suci Fajarni
reviews.reviewComments: Staying at Portola Grand Renggali Hotel Takengon was truly a satisfying experience. We booked a room with a view that directly faces Lake Lut Tawar. In the morning, the hotel's large window can also be used for sunbathing since the room offers a view of the sunrise. The hotel restaurant also provides a varied menu, and the breakfast is complete with a buffet. The service is friendly, the food is delicious, and the restaurant's atmosphere directly overlooks the lake, perfect for deep talks with your partner and simply unwinding while enjoying the fresh air of Takengon - Suci Fajarni.

reviews.reviewPositives: nothing beside the view in case you have a lakeside view
reviews.reviewNegatives: dirty room, leaking sink drainage, stains on the bed sheet, aircon not working at all, no toilet paper, no room service available even officially provided all time...horrible stay...just book it if ready to get disappointed

reviews.originalComment: Tempat nya bagus dan cantik, dipinggir danau, sarapan nya banyak jenis dan lezat. View nya cantik. Usulan agar dibuat space khusus untuk anak anak mandi di danau.
reviews.reviewComments: The place is nice and beautiful, by the lake, the breakfast has many varieties and is delicious. The view is beautiful. A suggestion to create a special space for children to swim in the lake.

reviews.reviewPositives: Yang saya sukai dari hotel ini adalah, tempat nya yang dekat dengan kota. Suasana alam nya dapat, dan makanannya enak.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Yang saya tidak suka adalah Kamar Mandinya kurang bersih, Pelayananan yg agak kurang, seperti kemarin Sandal dan handuk nya tidak ready. Terus kebersihan kamar nya juga sedikit kurang, saya harap pihak hotel bisa meminimalisir hal ini , supaya kedepan lebih baik lagi dalam hal kualitas kamar.

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya bagus, view cantik sarapan enak dan banyak , tapi tingkatkan kebersihan kamar mandi lagi ya
reviews.reviewComments: The place is nice, beautiful view, delicious breakfast with plenty of options, but please improve the cleanliness of the bathroom.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Грязно, комары, отсутствие полотенец, тупой персонал, не вкусная еда

reviews.originalComment: Tempat yang tepat untuk liburan dan mencari ketenangan dari kota. Berjarak cukup dekat dari pusat kota, Hotel Renggali cukup memberikan anda privasi dan keindahan yang memanjakan mata. Pelayanan OK, CS fast response, fasilitas mumpuni kebersihan bisa ditingkatkan kembali.
reviews.reviewComments: The perfect place for a vacation and to find peace away from the city. Located close to the city center, Hotel Renggali provides you with privacy and beauty that pleases the eye. The service is OK, customer service has a fast response, and cleanliness can be improved further.

reviews.reviewTitle: Jeg er ikke fornøyd og anbefaler ikke dette stedet
reviews.reviewPositives: Kul og rolig atmosfære nær innsjøen
reviews.reviewNegatives: Rommet var fullt av svarte maur overalt, på senga, på gulvet, på toalettet så det var umulig å sove der.  Badet er ikke rent, og gjestene har lov til å røyke i den felles stuen

reviews.originalComment: Saya pribadi sangat puas dengan harga yang ekonomis namun pelayanan dan fasilitas kamar yang sangat sangat baik. Harga ekonomis tetapi fasilitas sudah seperti hotel berbintang. Saya akan terus menggunakan portola ringgali setiap saya ke Takengon.
reviews.reviewComments: I am personally very satisfied with the economical price, yet the service and room facilities are very, very good. The price is economical, but the facilities are like those of a star-rated hotel. I will continue to use Portola Ringgali every time I go to Takengon.

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice play for a short stay during a trip on North Sumatra
reviews.reviewPositives: Nice location, quite a large complex. The staff is nice and helpful, and willing to give good service.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
A bit outdated, quality and hygiene standards could be a higher. I am convinced that more tourist would
come then.

reviews.originalComment: Menginap di Portola Grand Renggali Hotel Takengon benar-benar pengalaman yg memuaskan. Kami memesan kamar dgn view yg mengarah langsung ke Danau Lut Tawar. Di pagi hari, jendela kamar hotel yg cukup besar bs sekaligus dimanfaatkan untuk berjemur mengingat kamar tsb juga menawarkan pemandangan sunrise. Restoran hotel ini juga menyediakan menu yg bervariasi, sarapan jg lengkap dan buffet. reviews.reviewComments: I am personally very satisfied with the economical price, yet the service and room facilities are very, very good. The price is economical, but the facilities are like those of a star-rated hotel. I will continue to use Portola Ringgali every time I go to Takengon.

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice play for a short stay during a trip on North Sumatra
reviews.reviewPositives: Nice location, quite a large complex. The staff is nice and helpful, and willing to give good service.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
A bit outdated, quality and hygiene standards could be a higher. I am convinced that more tourist would
come then.

reviews.originalTitle: Hotel rekomendasi kalau di pinggir danau
reviews.originalComment: Pelayanannya ramah cepat. Menu breakfast juga komplit dengan view oke
reviews.reviewComments: The service is friendly and fast. The breakfast menu is also complete with a nice view.

reviews.reviewPositives:
The location is superb, absolutely incredible view of the shimmering lake and the gardens are oh so well maintained. The breakfast is quite simply delicious, plenty of options, both Indonesian, Western, egg station and great coffee too! 

Staff are super friendly, we had dinner at the property too and our waiter Jay/ Jalani was so friendly, spoke great English and could not help us enough, the food was delicious!
reviews.reviewNegatives: Very little!! It is a little way out of town, which suited us but perhaps if you were flying through and cared little for the lake (then you’re bonkas!) maybe it’s not for you.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel nyaman dgn view langsung danau. Staf yang ramah dan kamar yang bersih. Makanan beragam.
reviews.reviewComments: Comfortable hotel with a direct view of the lake. Friendly staff and clean rooms. Diverse food options.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Once u get into the room, it's worst. Toilet is very dirty. Stain on the bedsheet.

reviews.originalComment: Tempat nya bersih, lokasi pas ditepi danau, bisa mancing, bisa olahraga disepanjang pinggiran danau di lokasi hotel, mushola nya nyaman, tempat sarapan pas ditepi danau dengan pemandangan danau yg sangat cantik, menu sarapan standart bintang lima enak dan banyak variasinya, bisa ngopi expresso 25k di caffe tepi danau sambil ngobrol dimalam hari. Pengen kesini lagi apalagi kalau di kasi voucher diskon sama yg punya hotel ha ha ha...
reviews.reviewComments: The place is clean, perfectly located by the lake, you can fish, and exercise along the lakeside at the hotel location, the prayer room is comfortable, the breakfast area is right by the lake with a beautiful view of the lake, the breakfast menu is standard five-star, delicious, and has a lot of variety, you can have espresso for 25k at the lakeside cafe while chatting in the evening. I want to come here again, especially if I get a discount voucher from the hotel owner, haha...

reviews.reviewTitle: Cozy stay in a lake edge hotel.
reviews.reviewPositives: Its location.The only hotel here close to water edge.The lake
reviews.reviewNegatives: The walk down the road and the ramp to restaurant and breakfast.The restaurant is in a separate building.

reviews.reviewTitle: Staying at Grand Renggali makes the journey worthwhile.
reviews.originalTitle: Menginap di Grand Renggali, terbayar capai perjalanan
reviews.originalComment: Suasana hotel di pinggir danau yg asri membuat pikiran jernih
reviews.reviewComments: The atmosphere of the hotel by the pristine lake clears the mind.

reviews.reviewTitle: Nice old historical place with grand style and I would stay there again
reviews.reviewPositives: Staff tried hard to help us with our transportation needs and they had room service and an open restaurant with good food until 10 pm and hot water with good A/C unit.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Smoking in the hall outside our door and the smoke came in.
Having a non smoking section would be better
No English spoken by front desk staff created a long check in process

reviews.reviewTitle: Affordable hotel with a lake view
reviews.originalComment: Harga terjanhkau namun fasikitas cukuo okay dengan view danau Takengon. proses check in cepat hanya saja bangunan termasuk hotel lama sehingga kebersihan hotel hanya sebatas cukup. menu sarapan variatif.
reviews.reviewComments: Affordable price, but the facilities are quite okay with a view of Lake Takengon. The check-in process is quick, but the building, including the hotel, is old, so the hotel's cleanliness is just adequate. The breakfast menu is varied.
Nice play, very good view if you take lake view room, excellent breakfast. Very recomended

They are still recovering from big flood. Some amenities are broken (water heater jug, AC) and cleanliness could be improved especially the smelly toilet. But their staff go extra mile to serve and make up for what they lacked. Our room was upgraded because some are not functioning on the first one. Food was good and room service was affordable. The view to the lake also make the stay worth every penny.

reviews.originalTitle: Kebersihan harus benar2 di maksimal kan
reviews.originalComment: Tempat nya sangat bagus,sarapan nya juga sangat jempolan,tapi kebersihan nya perlu perhatian serius
reviews.reviewComments: The place is very nice, the breakfast is also excellent, but the cleanliness needs serious attention.

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnyaa bagus pemandangannya langsung danau, sudah keliling penginapan lain tapi renggali paling oke
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel has a great view directly of the lake, I have already checked other accommodations but this one is the best.

reviews.reviewTitle: Solo Turing transit to Takengon and stay at Portola Grand Renggali Hotel.
reviews.originalTitle: Solo turing  transit to takengon and stay at portola Grand Renggali Hotel.
reviews.originalComment: This Hotel located  on the side of Lut Tawar Lake ..I am very Enjoy stay in this Hotel, Clean , nice View . I wish  someday  i can visit again with my family .. ..
reviews.reviewComments: This hotel is located on the side of Lut Tawar Lake. I really enjoyed my stay at this hotel; it was clean with a nice view. I hope someday I can visit again with my family.
The hotel was feeling like our second home for sure i will recommend to our family and friends . F&B ,FO was amazing .  See you soon!!!

reviews.reviewTitle: Best hotel and value in the city
reviews.reviewComments: Wonderful atmosphere with very scenic views of the lake and mountains.  Kids can swim in the lake.  The breakfast is fantastic with wonderful coffee and many many different dishes.  I definitely recommend the hotel and i will return myself.  I cant recommend this hotel enough!  Definitely worth the trip to takengon alone.....
I was very excited staying in Portala Renggali Hotel with various scenary and what a tasted breakfast.

reviews.originalComment: Aminitas nya kurang, mungkin kedepannya bisa lebih baik lagi, untuk yang lain oke bagus staf ramah pemandangan bagus dan untuk sarapan juga enak.
reviews.reviewComments: Its amenities are lacking, but perhaps it can be better in the future. Everything else is okay, the staff are friendly, the view is nice, and the breakfast is good too.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel ini memiliki letak bgs dgn view danau laut tawar yang indah.saya menginap 2mlm di kmr 301 pd libur thn baru 2024/2025.toilet kmr sangat bau hingga menyegat! Closet tdk pernah disikat! Kmr tdr bocor...mngkin rembesan cor coran...hingga plafond bolong! Menejemen hrs cek hasil krj karyawan hingga ke toilet! Pdhl hotel ini lumayan megah...saya yakin jika secepat segera diperbaiki kinerja karyawan..hotel ini akan tetap jd pilihan terbaik di takengon!
reviews.reviewComments: This hotel has a great location with a beautiful view of the Lake Tawar. I stayed 2 nights in room 301 during the New Year holiday 2024/2025. The toilet in the room had a terrible smell! The toilet bowl had never been scrubbed! The bed was leaking... perhaps from a construction leak... resulting in a hole in the ceiling! Management needs to check the staff's work, including the toilets! Although this hotel is quite grand... I am sure that if the staff's performance is improved quickly, this hotel will remain the best choice in Takengon!

reviews.originalComment: Salah Hotel di kota yang recomended.. View nya oke di tepi danau.. Minusnya sarapan tidak begitu banyak varian, ketepatan waktu penyedian dengan waktu tamu datang masih kurang.
reviews.reviewComments: Recommended hotel in the city.. The view is nice by the lake.. The downside is that the breakfast doesn't have many options, and the timing for providing it doesn't align well with the guests' arrival.
Pesen deluxe dikasi kamar superior, pdhl dulu terkenal sekai. Kurang terawat, banyak tai cicak, extra bed per smua

reviews.originalComment: Rekomended hotel kelas menengah ke atas, tapi untuk kebersihan mungkin bisa lebih di perhatikan lagi spt kamar mandi yg mulai menguning, kain gorden yg sudah ada yg koyak dan juga seprei, selimut dan handuk yg masih ada nodanya. Selebihnya sudah ok sarapan dan layanan staff nya  cukup memuaskan.
reviews.reviewComments: Recommended mid-range to upscale hotel, but cleanliness could be improved, such as the bathroom that is starting to yellow, curtains that have some tears, and bed sheets, blankets, and towels that still have stains. Other than that, the breakfast and staff service are quite satisfactory.

Beautiful view from this hotel. The only proper hotel is located on the shore of the lake in Takengon, Central Aceh. All facilities overall are quite good. Rooms and bathrooms are okay, clean and comfortable. To create a better customer experience, breakfast menu variations must be considered.
Hotel yang sangat terawat dgn menu sarapan yg enak. Pemandangan danaunya juga bagus. Sangat direkomendasikan.

reviews.originalComment: Untuk lokasi yang cukup besar, kurangnya jumlah staff karena saat sarapan banyak menu yang kosong dan lama di Refill dan karena terdapat beberapa gedung dan beberapa lokasi parkiran sehingga saat customer butuh sesuatu harus kembali ke front office jika mau bertanya karena tidak ada staff yang berjaga jaga kecuali kalau sudah dikamar tinggal telfon dan langsung dilayani dengan baik.
reviews.reviewComments: For a location that is quite large, the lack of staff is evident because during breakfast, many menu items are empty and take a long time to refill, and because there are several buildings and parking areas, customers have to return to the front office if they need something since there are no staff on duty, unless they are already in the room, in which case they can just call and be served well.

Hari pertama check in dapat kamar mandinya bau, telepon tdk berfungsi, extrabed tidak bersih. 
hari kedua sy minta pindah kamar, bantalnya agak berbau.
Staff wanita di restoran tdk ramah, pelayanannya kurang baik, stok makanan prasmanan pada kosong karna lama bgt di refill nya. 
Utk view hotel bestt bangett
KAMAR MANDINYA BAU DARI SALURAN AIRNYA MENGUAP, HANDUK TIDAK DIANTAR KE KAMAR, LIFT NYA BUAT JANTUNGAN BUNYI2 GT, BANGUNAN KURANG TERAWAT DINDINGNYA PECAH DAN BERJAMUR
Elevator was broken during check in and check out so we need to carry luggage by ourself. Room allocation was not right and need to wait quite some time.
Room was not properly maintained, ac was leaking , wanted to call customer service the intercom was out of order. Location was good, staff was ok,

Pemandangan hotel langsung menghadap danau lut tawar, sangat indah. Staff ramah dan makanannya enak semua da bersih juga.  Namun, karena kami menginap di gedung bagian ujung seperti tidak terawat, kotor dan berantakan. Kedepannya bisa utk lbh diperhatikan lagi meskipun gedung itu jauh dari resepsionis tetap hrs terawat kebersihannya

1. Room smelled terrible. Ventilation needs to be maintained. 

2. Toilet was dirty. There's stain on the water closet. 

3. View was amazing.

reviews.originalComment:
Pelayanan resepsionis & pihak ob nya baikk banget diminta tolong gesit tanpa nunggu langsung apa aja beres ihh keren .

-sarapannya maaf ga enk (mungkin kenak di hari saya nginap aja gak enak) ,, pukul 07:35 udah pada abis semua karnaa ada rombongan dari malay & waktu mau ambil sambel malah ada lalat 🥹
Makanan yang sisah cuma mie,nasi goreng,ikan tongkol .. karna saya alergi ikan tongkol untung nya ada stann bagian indomie jadi pesan indomie goreng + telur 

-nya area kamar mandi kurang bersih, dibagian pintu kaca kamar mandi lumut
+pelayanan
+view
+HARGA NYA👏🏻
reviews.reviewComments:
The reception and the staff were very helpful and efficient, immediately taking care of everything without waiting, which is great.

- I apologize for the breakfast (maybe it was just my experience on the day I stayed) as everything was gone by 07:35 because there was a group from Malaysia, and when I wanted to grab sambal, there was a fly 🥹. The remaining food was just noodles, fried rice, and skipjack tuna... since I’m allergic to skipjack tuna, luckily there was an instant noodle section, so I ordered fried noodles + egg.

- The bathroom area was not very clean, and there was mold on the glass door of the bathroom. 
+ Service 
+ View 
+ PRICE 👏🏻

reviews.reviewTitle: Cleanliness and completeness of bathing supplies
reviews.originalComment: Handuk kamar mandi bau apek kurang harum, dan isi sabun di kamar mandi sudah habis dan lupa diisi ulang, satu lagi coba cek lagi kemasan bubuk teh dikamar apakah sudah expired? Karena warna teh berbeda sewaktu saya seduh,akhirnya tidak Jadi saya minum, untuk fasilitas lainnya saya lihat sudah bagus sih...tolong ditingkatkan kualitasnya ya,TRIms🙏
reviews.reviewComments: The bathroom towel smells musty and is not fragrant, and the soap in the bathroom has run out and was forgotten to be refilled. One more thing, please check if the tea powder packaging in the room is expired? Because the color of the tea was different when I brewed it, so I ended up not drinking it. As for the other facilities, I see that they are already good... please improve the quality, thank you 🙏

The room smelled horrible.  Changed another room but black out twice when boiling water. The  building design of the hotel is very unfriendly. There's lift but still needed to climb staircase up and down. Almost stumbled a few times when go in and out the room. Only the breakfast coffee was acceptable.

reviews.originalComment: Harga berbanding lurus dgn fasilitas yg ada...pertama masuk kamar aroma bau tdk sedap sangat tdk nyaman...heater water jg tdk berfungsi dgn baik wkt sore awal chek in sampai mlm menjelang wkt isya baru hidup heater water nya...dan keesokan pagi ketika mau mandi pagi dgn cuaca Takengon yg sangat dingin tp heater water nya tdk menyala/hidup sampai kami mau chek out d jam 9 pagi jg tdk menyala/hidup sungguh fasilitas tdk memadai...handuk dan keset kaki u d kamar wkt chek in dan masuk kamar jg tdk ada mesti d minta dulu kn resepsionis nya dan itupun menunggu terlalu lama lebih dr 3 jam setelah chek in/masuk kamar baru tersedia amenites yg d sediakan hotel...tolong d perhatikan u manajemen
reviews.reviewComments: The price is directly proportional to the available facilities... first entering the room, there was an unpleasant smell that made it very uncomfortable... the water heater also did not function properly; it was only working from the evening when I checked in until just before the evening prayer... and the next morning, when I wanted to take a shower in the very cold Takengon weather, the water heater did not turn on until we checked out at 9 a.m., it still did not turn on; truly inadequate facilities... towels and bathroom mats were not available in the room upon check-in; I had to request them from the receptionist, and it took too long, more than 3 hours after check-in to finally get the amenities provided by the hotel... please pay attention to this management.
ok, room kinda small. not so clean but ok. nice view tho.
Nice place to stay in Takengon
Very good service from staff. The view superb
Kamar bersih dan rapi.. ditambah pemandangan danau yang indah..
Ruangannya kotor dan bau rokok padahal saya pesan non smoking
It's convenient. The views is direct to the lake. Mesmerizing. It's clean too.
The hotel is good. I will come back again.
Good
Nice
Hotel nya bagus, pelayanan ramah, dekat dengan kota ditambah dengan pemandangan lut tawar.

so many trash. people who not staying at hotel may come and enjoy the view but they didn't keep the facilities clean.
the staffs are not helpful. I need to go to different building to talk to reception while no phone inside my room.
There's so many trash everywhere. The staff didn't helpful. there's 2 main building, but if we need something, we have to go to different building. no phone inside the room.
Good

reviews.reviewTitle: Middle east style building with fantastic lake view
reviews.reviewComments:
Booking 1 night only as we were heading to next city
Food just standard, but the atmosphere and lake view is fantastic
Staff is also friendly and helpful when needed
Room is okay just the tv is quite small and the channels are not clear.
But overall, the hotel is superb

reviews.reviewTitle: They refused to give us a room
reviews.reviewComments: Kecewa banget. Uda menempuh perjalanan 10 jam, nyampe sana katanya bookingan agoda ditolak, saya tdk tau di mana yg salah apakah dari pihak hotel atau pihak agoda, yg pasti pas kami di sana, ada byk anggota pemerintahan lagi buat acara juga di sana, mungkin kamar kami diberikan kepada mereka. Sumpah kecewa banget, ngak profesional

reviews.reviewTitle: Service and facilities has run down
reviews.reviewComments: The maintenance of this hotel is a problem, I have change my room from 3 floor to 2 floor and than 1 floor and my 1 floor after they bring me in, I asked them why no air conditioner and they said, old yah sorry sir we will change another room for you. I am sleepless. Not going back again.
Good
A very nice hotel with beautiful scenery, friendly staff, but cleanliness need to be improved better. Poorly managed and maintained by the people.
This hotel have great view

reviews.originalComment: hotel di pinggir danau yg bersih dan nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: clean and comfortable hotel by the lakeside

reviews.originalComment: Tempat bagus, pemandangan indah, harga juga bisa disesuaikan.
reviews.reviewComments: Great place, beautiful views, prices can also be adjusted.

reviews.originalComment: Bersih, serapan nya sedap, dan berpariasi, restoran nya nyaman sangat
reviews.reviewComments: Clean, the food absorbs well, and is varied, the restaurant is very comfortable.

reviews.originalComment: Makanan sangat oke,pemandangan luar biasa,sedikit tingkat kan kebersihan
reviews.reviewComments: The food is very good, the view is amazing, just slightly improve the cleanliness.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat nyaman reception nya ramah2, enak buat liburan kluarga
reviews.reviewComments: Very comfortable, the reception is friendly, great for a family vacation.

reviews.originalComment:
Saya heran sama yg kasih rating jelek (what do u expect)??? Saya booking via AGODA dapat harga murah Rp.350.200 pada tgl 19.04.2024 :

✅ Awalnya sempat ragu karna banyak bad review di google. Namun ketika datang Pelayanan Service = SOPAN + RAMAH (sengaja saya test ke staf2 berbeda) dan semuanya tetap senyum ramah, gak naik tensi

✅ VIEW DANAU, Bed queen size premium (bukan abal2), Bantal dacron, lantai granit, lemari besar 👍 

✅ Kamar bersih ber AC panasonic, 3 handuk, sabun sikat gigi, water heater shower, piring gelas sendok gula kopi teh, kaca sisir (semua tersedia) 👍

✅ VIEW SUPER BAGUS, banyak titik spot surgawi utk anak alay + cabe2an 👍

✅ Tersedia lift (bagi yg malas/capek naik tangga). Kamar sudah pakai sistem Key Card 

✅ Dapat BREAKFAST ALL U CAN EAT prasmanan sepuasnya (Lezat) dengan View Danau Lut Tawar 👍

✅ NO HORROR atau berhantu, jangan aneh2 lah pikiran klen ya

✅ Cuaca lumayan dingin. Kami datang pas cuaca 18-20 derajat

✅ Lokasi mudah ditemukan, parkiran luas (tidak curam), Friendly for Lansia & anak2

✅ Lokasi di pinggir Danau tapi dekat juga ke Kota (mudah cari pilihan makanan lainnya)

Semuanya didapat dgn harga Rp.350.200/mlm (Nilai 100/10 👍💯)
reviews.reviewComments:
I'm surprised by those giving bad ratings (what do you expect)??? I booked via AGODA and got a cheap price of Rp.350,200 on April 19, 2024:

✅ Initially, I was hesitant because of many bad reviews on Google. However, upon arrival, the service was = POLITE + FRIENDLY (I purposely tested different staff) and everyone still smiled amicably, not raising their voices.

✅ LAKE VIEW, premium queen size bed (not a substandard one), dacron pillows, granite floors, large wardrobe 👍

✅ The room was clean, equipped with a Panasonic air conditioner, 3 towels, soap, toothbrush, water heater shower, plates, glasses, spoons, sugar, coffee, tea, comb, (all available) 👍

✅ SUPER NICE VIEW, many heavenly spots for kids and young people 👍

✅ An elevator is available (for those who are lazy/tired of climbing stairs). The room uses a Key Card system.

✅ Got ALL YOU CAN EAT breakfast buffet (Delicious) with a view of Lake Lut Tawar 👍

✅ NO HORROR or haunting, don’t let your minds wander too much.

✅ The weather was quite cool. We arrived when the weather was 18-20 degrees.

✅ The location is easy to find, spacious parking (not steep), friendly for the elderly & children.

✅ Located by the lake but also close to the city (easy to find other food options).

All this was obtained for Rp.350,200/night (Rating 100/10 👍💯)

reviews.reviewComments:
I am surprised by those who give bad ratings (what do you expect)??? I booked via AGODA and got a cheap price of Rp.350,200 on 19.04.2024:

✅ At first, I was hesitant because of the many bad reviews on Google. However, when I arrived, the service was = POLITE + FRIENDLY (I deliberately tested different staff) and they all remained smiling and friendly, not raising their voices.

✅ LAKE VIEW, premium queen size bed (not a cheap one), dacron pillows, granite floor, large closet 👍

✅ The room is clean with a Panasonic air conditioner, 3 towels, toothbrush soap, shower water heater, plates, glasses, spoons, sugar, coffee, tea, comb mirror (all available) 👍

✅ SUPER GREAT VIEW, many heavenly spots for young people + spicy foods 👍

✅ There is an elevator (for those who are lazy/tired to climb stairs). The room already uses a Key Card system.

✅ You get ALL YOU CAN EAT breakfast buffet (delicious) with a view of Lake Lut Tawar 👍

✅ NO HORROR or haunted, don’t think weirdly, please.

✅ The weather is quite cool. We came when it was 18-20 degrees.

✅ The location is easy to find, spacious parking (not steep), friendly for the elderly & children.

✅ The location is by the lake but also close to the city (easy to find other food options).

All of this was obtained for the price of Rp.350,200/night (Value 100/10 👍💯)

Cheap rate but great lake view from our room. The room was spacious. The food was delicious. Nice ambience with friendly staff.

Need to improve are: the availability of extra bed &  need to repair the water faucets.

Overall good
Untuk kamarnya nyaman, bersih & luas.
Viewnya juaraaak danau laut tawar😍😍
Big thanks for Mr Ferry as GM & Mr Joy as Fb spv super humble & helpful.
Will come back soon.

Hotelnya sangat cantik dengan view langsung ke danau  Lut Tawar yg memukau.  Fasilitas di hotel sangat lengkap. Meski di daerah dingin, hotel ini tetap provide AC. Namun saat ada bbrp yg harus diperbaiki. Seperti seprai yg kurang bersih(terdapat bercak noda), compliment air mineral juga tidak tersedia, namun setelah kami meneghubungi Resepsionis, langsung diberikan. Bisa jadi staff lupa merefill kembali teh kopi gula saat membersihkan kamar yg baru dipakai tamu sebelumnya. Kamar mandi juga agar lebih diperhatikan kebersihannya. Overall semua baik, terutama breakfast di restaurantnya enak2. Next kalo ke Takengon kami akan coba lagi kesini

reviews.originalComment: View nya langsung ke danau, saya sangat sering menginap di sini makanan nya enak2 staf nya ramah2 apalagi yang di receptionist terbaiklah pokoknya🙏👍👍👍
reviews.reviewComments: The view is directly to the lake, I often stay here, the food is delicious, the staff is friendly, especially the one at the reception, they're the best overall 🙏👍👍👍

reviews.reviewTitle: Luxury hotels by the shores of Lake Lut Tawar.
reviews.originalTitle: Hotel termewah di pinggiran danau lut tawar
reviews.originalComment: Hotel ini sangat bagus, pelayanan baik makanan enak-enak, staf ramah pemandangan sangat indah langsung menghadap danau 👍👍👍👍👍🙏🙏
reviews.reviewComments: This hotel is very nice, good service, delicious food, friendly staff, and the view is very beautiful, facing the lake directly. 👍👍👍👍👍🙏🙏

reviews.originalComment: Pemandangan nya sangat bagus, makanan enak"  Staf ramah"  Kamar sangat nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: The view is very nice, the food is delicious, the staff is friendly, and the room is very comfortable.

reviews.reviewTitle: The best hotel view in Central Aceh
reviews.originalTitle: Hotel view terbaik di Aceh tengah
reviews.originalComment: Hotel dengan pemandangan yang sangat indah, nyaman, staf nya ramah2 sekali apalagi yang staf malam  di receptionist 🤗🙏
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel with a very beautiful view, comfortable, and the staff is extremely friendly, especially the night receptionist. 🤗🙏

reviews.originalComment: View Hotel nya sangat indah, makanan enak-enak, kamarnya nyaman, staf nya sangat ramah sekali sangat puas menginap di sini🙏🙏🙏✌
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel view is very beautiful, the food is delicious, the room is comfortable, and the staff is very friendly. I am very satisfied staying here 🙏🙏🙏✌

Vraiment top la vue est magnifique. 

Petit déjeuner au restaurant de l'hôtel avec un buffet au choix multiples. 

J'y retournerai sans hésitation

reviews.reviewTitle: Old hotel no longer at standard. Along the lake but difficult access to city center
reviews.reviewComments:
Old hotel with not clean rooms. Very nice view to the lake but we were told no taxi from/to the city center. 
Staff was helpful to drive us fortunately.
Laundry was outrageously expensive.
Seems to be better options for same price in the city center

Malgré le bon accueil du personnel, la saleté des chambres et de l'hôtel au global a fortement gâché notre séjour : beaucoup de tâches sur les draps, odeur et tâches de moisissures dans la chambre, mobilier cassé... Vraiment dommage.
Wer Ruhe und guten Service haben möchte ist dort genau richtig. Die Lady am Empfang bekommt von mir sechs Sterne von fünf. Hat sie verdient. Danke an sie nochmals.

Het is een vrij nieuw hotel met een bepaalde allure 
Het gordijn hing los bovenaan en de stofnesten vielen uit de ventilatie 
De muren konden ook nog wel een likje verf gebruiken 
Het ontbijt was heel uitgebreid, lekkere koffie, we vroegen toast met een eitje en dat brachten ze. Het personeel was heel gedienstig
nice view
Secara keseluruhan bagus, view bagus tapi mohon diperhatikan untuk fasilitas tamu seperti (sabun, sendal kamar, kopi tamu) trims

Kamar superior Queen gordennya sudah robek dan tidak menggunakan filtrasi. Ada baiknya lebih dicek lagi untuk fasilitas kamar. Tapi restorannya sangat baik. Makanannya lengkap dengan view danau yang indah 👍
Hotel bintang 3 tidak ada air panas, barang2 cleaning service tidak ada gudang,ditaruh di ruang tamu...lokasi agak jauh kedalam Dari kota takengon
Sebenarnya sudah bagus tapi yang mengecewakan cuma satu hal, seharusnya dengan budget paket 400ribuan, sudah layak mendapatkan sarapan. Ini malah tidak dapat.

reviews.reviewTitle: Lokasi bagus, service dan fasilitas buruk
reviews.reviewComments: Lokasi hotel pinggir danau, checkin lama, lift rusak, petugas hotel sdikit, kunci kmr mandi tdk ada, telpon tdk fungsi, signal tv macet2, bantal cuman 2 kecil, kamar mandi kotor, air closet bunyi2, dll... Sgt tdk recomended

reviews.reviewTitle: Pelayanan semakin buruk dibandingkan dengan kunjungan kami sebelumnya
reviews.reviewComments:
Seprei kotor...kita minta ganti alasan room boy udah pulang...
Fasilitas kamar mandi g lengkap
Tissue g ada, sendal g ada..semua harus kita minta²..
Sarapan..iiiih ampun.. jauh banget sama waktu kunjungan kita sebelum banjir...udah asal²an...
Saran kami kembalikan layanan seperti dulu..lebih baik naikkan harga dari pada mengurangi kwalitas layanan...

Kami chek in pukul 21:30 wib . Selang waktu 30 menit. Minta tolong diantarkan keset untuk kamar mandi karena air shower yg keluar pintu, kami hubungi via call center wa, dengan balasan agar menunggu untuk diantarkan, namun sampai lewat jam 24:00 dini hari pun belum diantarkan sehingga kami mencoba wa kembali dan hanya diread saja. Sampai kami menunggu hingga besok pagi pun tidak kunjung diantarkan kesetnya.

Harap pelayanannya ditingkatkan kembali, apalagi cuman minta keset.

reviews.reviewTitle: Kamar jorok,seprei tidak diganti ada noda darah
reviews.reviewComments: Kamar mandi bau dari  kloset,seprei tidak diganti,malah setelah nyambung 2 malam tetap tidak diganti,untuk lokasi hotel cukup bagus

Pintu kamar rusak, menunggu perbaikan lebih kurang setengah jam, lalu handuk dan keset kamar mandi tidak ada lalu menunggu lebih kurang dua jam baru diberikan, handuk agak lembab dan kelihatan tua, setelah menginap satu malam kamar tidak dirapikan dan sampah tidak dikumpulkan, handuk lembab tidak diganti,  setelah disampaikan keluhan baru kamar dirapikan handuk diganti walau dengan keadaan yang sama dengan hari pertama dan keset kamar mandi baru tersedia,  dan sampah dikumpulkan, lantai di sekitar tangga kurang bersih, ada noda lengket bekas sisa makanan, harapan saya pihak manajemen memperbaiki kekurangan ini, selain itu oke

Terima kasih sebelumnya saya kritik untuk perbaikan.  Ruang kamar 2009 luas namun pelayanan buruk. Handuk tersedia setelah 3 jam check in. 3 kali minta ke reception utk body soap juga tidak disediakan. Balcon kotor. Terima kasih
Checkinnya telat banget baru bisa check in set5. Fasilitasnya juga banyak yang gak bisa

reviews.reviewTitle: Clear informasi and need room photo's
reviews.reviewComments: Untuk balcony/teras harus clear di gambar setiap room yang diposting di gambar. Tipe kamar superior terlalu sempit untuk closet, door Dan partisi kaca. Posisi closet duduk kurang tepat. Over all good hanya butuh di cek untuk ketersediaan amenities room unit Dan bathroom.

Saya tidak bisa hadir pada hari H karena musibah tapi tidak ada kebijakan refund.  Tidak bisa ganti tanggal. Tidak ada toleran ini hotel, padahal dikembalikan sedikit saja kan boleh. Ini merugikan.
